name: Attack on Toys
short_description: Relive Your Childhood Toys comes to life! Build your Army Toys, make battle scenario, watch the Toys battling each other, and customize your play with Attack on Toys Toy Box. Command your Army Toys to fight againts another toys strategically and keep them alive during battle!
detailed_description:
★ Attack on Toys: LOCAL & ONLINE SPLIT-SCREEN - 2025 UPDATE! NOW AVAILABLE!

★ Remembering playing Split Screen with family or goes to friend house and bringing your own controller & memory card? You could do exactly that with Attack on Toys!

  • Fully Dynamic Offline / Online Split Screen and Multi Profile - Save Data Memory System! Please see below for more details & features about the Split Screen! 🠋


🔧 Attack on Toys: STEAM® Workshop - Mods & Level Creations

  • Create your own Level Creations!

  • Edit & Customize Community Level Creations.

  • Play & Share Levels. Made by you and Community.

    🔧 Attack on Toys - MODS:

  • Grow your Toys Mod Collection.

  • Create & Combine Community Mods into your own Level Creations!

🔧 Attack on Toys: How to create Mods & Toy-Box Guide & Video Tutorial is Available at Attack on Toys STEAM® Workshops and N7T-GAMES YouTube Channel


★ Attack on Toys: LOCAL & ONLINE SPLIT-SCREEN

  • Complete Single Player & Split Screen experience!

  • Play Local / Offline Split Screen

  • Play Online Split Screen with your close friends using STEAM® REMOTE PLAY TOGETHER

  • Invite your STEAM® Friend List or use Link Invitation to play together! Anyone can join even if they don't own Attack on Toys!

  • Multi Profile - Save Data: Use your own save data profile and access your Squad, Item, and Loadout! Battle, Level Up, and Save your Progress together with your friend!

  • Play with up to 4-Players and only ONE copy of Attack on Toys is required!

  • Play using Mouse & Keyboard (P1) or Gamepad Controller (P1, P2, P3, P4)

  • Create your own custom map battle for Split Screen!

  • Attack on Toys Split Screen is fully compatible with all game modes (PvP, Invasion, Skirmish, Conquest, Toy-Box, Custom Toy-Box, Mods, and STEAM® Workshops)

★ First time trying to play Online Split Screen using STEAM® REMOTE PLAY TOGETHER? Please see the tutorial at Attack on Toys STEAM® Discussion or STEAM® Guide


⚑ Attack on Toys: Early Access Note

★ Attack on Toys development will focus more towards Single Player content rather than Multiplayer.

★ At current state Attack on Toys Multiplayer is LAN Only”. LAN PvP Official Maps & LAN Co-op Invasion Official Maps only! (Toy-Box or Workshop is for Single Player Only)

★ Supported Gamepad: Xbox, Switch Pro, DualShock, other Generic Gamepad


About the Game


Relive Your Childhood Toys comes to life! Build your Army Toys, make battle scenario, watch the Toys battling each other, and customize your play with Attack on Toys Toy Box. Command your Army Toys to fight against another toys strategically and keep them alive during battle!

Attack on Toys is a 3rd-person shooter mixed with combination of Real-time strategy as Toy Army Soldiers. Pick your favourite Army color and ride to the battle! Use Tank, Helicopter, Jeep, robot mech? and build your own Army Squad to win the battle against other Toys.


  • INVASION: Defend your HQ with unlimited wave of enemies invasion.
  • TERROR INVASION: Defend your HQ with unlimited wave of enemies invasion. (Zombies!, Cockroach, Spider)
  • SKIRMISH: Destroy all enemies HQ to win.
  • CONQUEST: Claim and defend your territories against enemies.
  • PvP 'LAN': Destroy all Enemy Player HQ to win.


  • Massive Army Toys Battle
  • Third-Person Shooter with mix of Real-Time Strategy Map
  • First-Person view
  • Destructible Building & Enemy
  • Level up and Customize your Toy Soldier
  • Create your own Squad and Level up your Squad through battle
  • Permanent Death on Squad Member
  • Collectible Items, Weapons, Backpacks, Hats, and much more
  • Driveable Vehicles, Towers, Helicopters, and Planes
  • Play & Share Toy-Box level creations on STEAM® Workshop


  • Army Men
  • HYPERCHARGE: Unboxed
  • The Mean Greens - Plastic Warfare
  • Home Wars


★ Purchasing Attack on Toys: STEAM® Edition is to help development of the Game quicker.
★ STEAM® Edition will unlock Steam platform features like Save Cloud, Achievements, Leaderboards, and Workshop.
